request.description:
These `params` control how the **Leboncoin Listings & Phone Search Export** crawler behaves. Most parameters are shared with the [Leboncoin Listings Search Export](#6a9e6eb1-3b5c-494e-9cdb-b10aebc8d1f2) crawler, see that section for common settings.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **functions.phone** | boolean | If `true`, visits each listing to extract phone numbers (incurs extra credits). |

---

### ⚠️ **Additional Notes**

- Enabling **functions.phone** adds extra requests per listing, increasing run time and credit usage.

response.name: Example

request.description: These `result` objects are identical to those of [Leboncoin Listings Search Export](#6a9e6eb1-3b5c-494e-9cdb-b10aebc8d1f2)
